billing_dispute.description: Customer disputes a charge on their account
steps: If error confirmed, initiate refund process
Provide reference number for the dispute
billing_dispute.escalation_threshold: If charge exceeds $500 or customer requests supervisor

defective_product.description: Customer received a defective or damaged product
steps: Gather product details and order number
Offer immediate replacement or full refund
Expedite replacement shipping at no cost
defective_product.escalation_threshold: If replacement also defective or customer demands compensation beyond policy

late_delivery.description: Customer's order has not arrived within expected timeframe
steps: Look up order and tracking information
Offer shipping refund if significantly late
File claim with carrier if package lost
late_delivery.escalation_threshold: If package lost for more than 10 days or customer needs urgent replacement

angry_customer.description: Customer is visibly upset or using aggressive language
steps: Remain calm and professional at all times
Offer to involve a supervisor if requested
angry_customer.escalation_threshold: If customer uses threatening language or explicitly demands a manager

technical_support.description: Customer needs help with product setup or troubleshooting
steps: Identify the specific product and issue
Reference product manual or online guides
Escalate to technical team if issue persists
Document the issue for knowledge base
technical_support.escalation_threshold: If issue requires engineering-level expertise or affects multiple customers
technical_support.resolution_time: Same-day for basic issues, 24-72 hours for complex
